shots.title: Manual Branch B model 4.7 same-depth far standoff keyframe
shots.story_beat: Fenshou and Shuangji face each other as two small distant figures across a rain-soaked temple courtyard.
shots.visual_goal: Use the manually verified Branch B prompt with locked scene composition, distant left-right placement, and Shuangji direction fix.
shots.action_goal: Two-character confrontation with both figures distant, small, and separated by a broad wet-stone courtyard.
shots.camera_goal: Preserve the locked scene camera and composition while avoiding the previous center-anchor/midground subject layout.
shots.notes: KF-004 package uses manual prompt txt as current source of truth. No runtime code changes.
